title: Paste conversation text shows in editable textarea before analysis
description: Verifies a user can paste a conversation into the workspace and review it in an editable textarea before starting any analysis.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Hello, how can I help you today?\nCustomer: My package is delayed and I'm frustrated.\nAgent: I’m sorry—let me check the status." into "conversation textarea"
Verify text "Agent: Hello, how can I help you today?" is visible
Verify text "Customer: My package is delayed and I'm frustrated." is visible

title: Pasted text remains editable after review
description: Verifies a user can edit the pasted conversation text in the textarea prior to analysis.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Hi.\nCustomer: I need to change my delivery address." into "conversation textarea"
Verify text "I need to change my delivery address." is visible
Type "\nAgent: I can help with that—what is the new address?" into "conversation textarea"
Verify text "what is the new address?" is visible

title: Successful analysis of a pasted conversation shows all key output sections
description: Verifies that submitting valid conversation text completes analysis and displays transcript, emotion, security, synthesis, and fraud verdict outputs.

steps.description:
Type "Agent: Hello, this is Sentinel Support.
Caller: Hi, I see an unknown charge on my card.
Agent: I can help—can you confirm your last 4 digits?
Caller: 1234.
Agent: Thanks. I also need your billing ZIP.
Caller: 90210." into the conversation text input area

title: New Analysis clears the input after a completed analysis
description: Verifies that clicking New Analysis resets the workflow and clears the conversation text input state.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Thanks for calling.\nCaller: I forgot my password and need help resetting it." into the conversation text input area
Verify the conversation text input area is visible

title: Analyze button does not proceed when conversation text is empty
description: Verifies that the user cannot start analysis with an empty input and receives a visible prompt or no analysis state.

title: Very long pasted conversation triggers analysis and eventually renders results
description: Verifies the UI can accept a large pasted conversation and still progress through analysis to visible results (or a clear error).

steps.description:
Type "Agent: Hello.
Caller: I am calling about my shipment delay.
Agent: Let me check.
Caller: The order was placed last week and I need it urgently.
Agent: I see the carrier reported a weather exception.
Caller: This is unacceptable.
Agent: I can offer expedited replacement.
Caller: Also, I want to confirm no one accessed my account.
Agent: I will verify recent logins and send a report.
Caller: Please do.
Agent: Anything else?
Caller: No, thank you." into the conversation text input area

title: Special characters and mixed languages are accepted and analyzed
description: Verifies the input accepts punctuation, symbols, and non-English text and still attempts analysis with a visible result or a clear error banner.

steps.description:
Type "Agent: Hello! ¿En qué puedo ayudarle?
Caller: Me cobraron $50—no reconozco el cargo.
Agent: We’ll investigate ASAP.
Caller: 我的卡可能被盗了。" into the conversation text input area

title: Analyze pasted conversation and review full set of analysis outputs
description: Verifies that submitting pasted text and running analysis displays transcript, emotion gauges, security risk, intent/translation/context, action cards, and (if applicable) fraud verdict banner.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Hello, thanks for calling. Customer: I'm very upset—my package never arrived and I need a refund now. Agent: I can help. Can you confirm your order number? Customer: It's 12345 and I think someone used my card." into the main conversation input area

title: Transcript bubbles render both speaker turns after analysis completes
description: Verifies the transcript section shows distinct customer and agent turns after running analysis on pasted text.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Good afternoon. Customer: Your driver left my shipment at the wrong address. Agent: I apologize. Customer: This is the third time and I'm furious." into the main conversation input area

title: Emotion/prosody gauges are visible after a successful analysis
description: Verifies the frustration, anxiety, politeness, and confidence gauges appear in the UI after analysis runs.

steps.description: Type "Customer: I'm anxious because my passport delivery is late. Agent: I understand. Customer: Please confirm it will arrive tomorrow. Agent: I'll expedite." into the main conversation input area

title: Security/deepfake risk section is visible after analysis
description: Verifies the deepfake score, risk level, and threat status area is shown after analysis runs.

steps.description: Type "Customer: I need to change the bank account for my refunds immediately. Agent: I can help. Customer: Just do it now—I'm in a hurry." into the main conversation input area

title: Intent, translation, and cultural context cards appear after analysis
description: Verifies that intent synthesis and language/cultural context outputs are presented as visible cards/sections.

steps.description: Type "Customer: Hola, necesito ayuda con mi entrega. Agent: Claro. Customer: No llegó y estoy preocupado. Agent: Revisaré el estado." into the main conversation input area

title: Action-advised recommendations are visible after analysis
description: Verifies that action-advised cards/recommendations are shown after a completed analysis.

steps.description: Type "Customer: I want to cancel and get a refund. Agent: I can process that. Customer: Also update my delivery instructions." into the main conversation input area

title: Click Analyze with no input shows validation/empty-state messaging
description: Verifies that analyzing with no provided input does not produce results and displays a visible validation or empty-state message.

title: After no-input validation, pasting text and analyzing shows results
description: Verifies a user can recover from the no-input state by pasting text and successfully getting visible results sections.

steps.description: Type "Agent: Thanks for reaching out. Customer: My order was marked delivered but I never received it." into the main conversation input area

title: Fraud verdict banner is handled gracefully (visible when present, absent otherwise)
description: Verifies the UI can display a fraud verdict banner when the analysis indicates fraud, without breaking the rest of the results view if it is not present.

steps.description: Type "Customer: I need you to reset the account email and ship to a new address today. Agent: I can help after verification. Customer: I can't verify—just do it now." into the main conversation input area
